Uses of Class
me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing.JGeminiDialog

Packages that use JGeminiDialog
Package
Description
me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
The Swing user interface for JGemini.

  • Uses of JGeminiDialog in me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing

    Subclasses of JGeminiDialog in me.kevinboone.jgemini.swing
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AttachIdentityDialog
    The "Attach identity" dialog, that manages assigning a named identity to an existing Java keystore.
    class 
    EditFileDialog
    A simple file editor, which JGemini uses to edit the bookmarks file, settings file, and perhaps others in future.
    class 
    IdentityDialog
    Implements the Identity tag of the Settings dialog.
    class 
    NewIdentityDialog
    Implements the "New identity" dialog.
    class 
    SelectActionDialog
    Implements the Select action dialog, which is raised when the user follows a link to a type of content we don't handle.
    class 
    SettingsDialog
    Implements the Settings dialog.
    class 
    TextEntryDialog
    A text entry dialog specifically for entering text that will be encoded into the 'query' part of a URL.
